title: Legion protocol common actor, provenance, error, blocker, and validation schemas

createdAt.description: Canonical UTC timestamp formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ.

schemaVersion.description: Major.minor.patch schema version without leading zeroes.

path.description: Relative POSIX artifact path inside an approved artifact root.

sha256.description: Lowercase SHA-256 content hash with sha256: prefix.
